description: Detects stalled persuasion where smaller commitments could move conversation forward.
meeting_relevance: Small commitments may move stalled conversations forward.

prompt_templates_live.text: Get the next step, not full buy-in.

prompt_templates_post: You continued seeking full agreement when a smaller commitment might have advanced the discussion.
risk_notes: Do not imply user is being pushy.
allowed_inferences: A smaller ask may be more effective.
